scope: Full-surface Jira Cloud REST API v3 pass for issues #107-#110. All 620 official OpenAPI operations are inventoried from swagger-v3.v3.json: 276 GET, 135 POST, 119 PUT, and 90 DELETE. Existing issue/project/user streams remain stream-backed; safe JSON GET endpoints are exposed as bounded typed direct reads with json_redacted output; mutating endpoints are modeled as named reverse-ETL write actions; binary downloads/uploads and POST body read-query operations are explicitly blocked with operation-ledger evidence until their specialized executors are enabled.

operation.reason: Safe read-query POST requires fixed body-variable direct-read execution; classified as rest_query in operations.json and blocked until that executor shape is wired.
Binary Jira response is inventoried with a bounded binary_download operation, but no local file-output executor is enabled for Jira in this slice.
